query:
-- First check current state of item 39
SELECT scm.id, scm.item_id, scm.category_id, scm.status, bc.name as category_name, si.item_number, si.name as item_name
FROM cpa_scope_category_matrix scm
JOIN cpa_building_categories bc ON scm.category_id = bc.id
JOIN cpa_scope_items si ON scm.item_id = si.id
WHERE si.item_number = 39;

JOIN cpa_building_categories bc ON scm.category_id = bc.id
JOIN cpa_scope_items si ON scm.item_id = si.id
